<noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Card
| name      = Ratchanter
| type      = Minion
| element   = Dark
| tribe     = Rat
| cost      = 4
| attack    = 15
| hp        = 30
| range     = 0
| unique    = true
| rules     = Activated: pay 2 mana to conjure a Common Rat and buff it.
| flavor    = The rats listen, and the rats remember.
| collector = 024/033
| art       = Ratchanter.png
| patch     = 0.4.2
| stable_id = ratchanter
| deckable  = true
}}
</pre>

This template renders a card infobox AND emits SMW property annotations in a
single pass. The infobox is a faithful replica of the game client's full-art
card frame (renderCardFrame / .cf2 in game.css + game.js): aged ivory stock,
element-tinted frame and chips, floating type-coded rule boxes (minion
leather / magic purple / react hot pink), stat rail, and collector footer.
The .cf2-* styles live in MediaWiki:Common.css (pushed by sync_polish.py).
A slim ivory meta table below the card carries the Type/Element/Tribe/Range
links for navigation.
</noinclude><includeonly><div class="gt-card gt-cardwrap gt-element-{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}"><div class="card-frame card-frame-full cf2 cf2-{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood|fire|earth|water|metal|dark|light={{lc:{{{element}}}}}|#default=neutral}}{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}|minion||&#32;cf2-spell}}"><div class="cf2-frame"><div class="cf2-artbg">[[File:{{{art|CardBack.png}}}|300px|link=]]</div><div class="cf2-head"><div class="cf2-chip cf2-cost"><span class="cf2-chip-lbl">Mana</span><span class="cf2-cnum">{{{cost|?}}}</span></div><div class="cf2-namebox"><div class="cf2-name">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</div><div class="cf2-subtype"><span class="cf2-d">◆</span> {{{element|Neutral}}}{{#if:{{{tribe|}}}|&#32;<span class="cf2-d">◆</span> {{{tribe}}}}}</div></div><div class="cf2-chip cf2-elem"><span class="cf2-chip-lbl">{{{element|?}}}</span><span class="cf2-eico">{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood=🌿|fire=🔥|earth=⛰️|water=💧|metal=⚙️|dark=🌑|light=☀️|#default=◇}}</span></div></div>{{#if:{{{range|}}}{{{unique|}}}|<div class="cf2-tags">{{#if:{{{range|}}}|<span class="cf2-tag">{{#ifeq:{{{range}}}|0|Melee|Range {{{range}}}}}</span>}}{{#ifeq:{{{unique|}}}|true|<span class="cf2-tag">Unique</span>}}</div>}}<div class="cf2-artspace"></div><div class="cf2-body"><div class="cf2-text">{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}|magic=<div class="cf2-mode cf2-magic"><span class="cf2-modehead">✨ Cast · {{{cost|?}}} mana — your turn</span><div class="cf2-ability">{{{rules|}}}</div>{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr class="cf2-flavor-rule"/><span class="cf2-flavor">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}</div>|react=<div class="cf2-mode cf2-react"><span class="cf2-modehead">⚡ React · {{{cost|?}}} mana</span><div class="cf2-ability">{{{rules|}}}</div>{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr class="cf2-flavor-rule"/><span class="cf2-flavor">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}</div>|#default=<div class="cf2-mode cf2-minion"><div class="cf2-ability">{{{rules|}}}</div>{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr class="cf2-flavor-rule"/><span class="cf2-flavor">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}</div>}}{{#if:{{{react_rules|}}}|<div class="cf2-ordiv">or</div><div class="cf2-mode cf2-react"><span class="cf2-modehead">⚡ React · {{{react_cost|{{{cost|?}}}}}} mana</span><div class="cf2-ability">{{{react_rules}}}</div></div>}}</div>{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|<div class="cf2-rail"><div class="cf2-stat"><span class="cf2-stat-lbl">Attack</span><span class="cf2-stat-val">{{{attack}}}</span></div><div class="cf2-stat"><span class="cf2-stat-lbl">Health</span><span class="cf2-stat-val">{{{hp|?}}}</span></div></div>}}</div><div class="cf2-foot"><span>{{{collector|—}}}</span><span>Core Beta WIP</span><span>© 2026 Grid Tactics</span></div></div></div>
{| class="gt-card-meta"
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:5px 12px; background:rgba(222,208,168,0.5); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(107,87,48,0.3);" | <span style="color:#6b5730; font-family:'Alegreya SC',Georgia,serif; font-weight:700; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase;">Type</span> <span style="float:right; color:#241c10; font-weight:700;">[[{{{type|Minion}}}]]</span>
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:5px 12px; background:rgba(222,208,168,0.5); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(107,87,48,0.3);" | <span style="color:#6b5730; font-family:'Alegreya SC',Georgia,serif; font-weight:700; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase;">Element</span> <span style="float:right; color:#241c10; font-weight:700;">[[{{{element|Neutral}}}]]</span>
{{{meta_rows|}}}
|}
</div>


{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#set:Name={{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{stable_id|}}}|{{#set:StableId={{{stable_id}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#set:CardType={{{type}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|{{#set:Element={{{element}}} }}}}{{{tribe_annotations|}}}{{#if:{{{cost|}}}|{{#set:ManaCost={{{cost}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|{{#set:Attack={{{attack}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{hp|}}}|{{#set:HP={{{hp}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#set:Range={{{range}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{art|}}}|{{#set:ArtFile=File:{{{art}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{patch|}}}|{{#set:FirstPatch={{{patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{last_changed_patch|}}}|{{#set:LastChangedPatch={{{last_changed_patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{deckable|}}}|{{#set:Deckable={{{deckable}}} }}}}{{{keyword_annotations|}}}{{#set:LastModified={{CURRENTTIMESTAMP}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{deprecated|}}}|1|[[Category:Deprecated]]|[[Category:Card]]}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|[[Category:{{{element}}} cards]]}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|[[Category:{{{type}}}s]]}}</includeonly>
